title: efossus obvallatus
intro: Efossus obvallatus, also known as the spiny wood sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat kidney stones, as it contains oxalate-degrading enzymes that help break down calcium oxalate crystals. The health benefits of Efossus obvallatus include its potential to act as a natural diuretic, which can help alleviate urinary tract issues and reduce inflammation. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
